name: Ransom v. FIA Card Services, N.A.
question: In calculating a debtor's "projected disposable income" during a Chapter 13 bankruptcy plan period, can a bankruptcy court allow an ownership cost deduction for vehicles only if the debtor is actually making payments on the vehicles?
description: A case in which the Court held that a debtor who does not make a loan or lease payment could not take the car-ownership deduction.
